title: Teng 3800frp Quick Release Ratchet 3/8in Square Drive
features: Creates a 45 teeth (8 deg increment) ratchet.
With quick release and flip reverse.
description: Product Description 3/8" drive steel reinforced fiber ratchet for reduced weight but no loss of power. Quick release function to secure the socket. 45 teeth gives a working arc of only 8 degrees. Turn reverse lever to change ratchet direction. Two-material handle with ergonomic design for slip resistance and comfort especially in cold environments. All parts and service kits are available and easy to assemble. All Teng Tools sockets and accessories are individually labeled and manufactured from high quality chrome vanadium steel to meet the latest DIN and ISO standards. All sockets are manufactured according to Teng Tools' "Hip Grip" system, which means that the sockets stick to the flat surfaces of the nut instead of the corner. This system helps prevent damage to nuts and bolts and allows to grip nuts and bolts that already have damaged corners. Manufacturer's Description Teng Quick Release Reversible Ratchet Handle Ratchet Handle which is reinforced for improved performance. With flip reverse and quick release. 3/8in square drive
